name: Catch Cat Crush
original_name: รักไม่บอก...เหมียวบอกให้
overview:
Smay(Puifai) returns to their old home in search of the new owner of their parents' house, hoping to buy it back. However, this return leads Smay to reunite with Thian (Ferin)the elegant yet aloof neighbor from their childhood.

Despite Smay's cheerful and affectionate attempts to win her over, Thian responds with indifference and a hint of annoyance. Meanwhile, "MomMam," Thian's mischievous cat, keeps a close watch on every moment.

Amidst a whirlwind of love, hidden truths, and unresolved pasts, Smay and Thian must confront their feelings and their history. How will their hearts find their way? Stay tuned to find out soon!

trailers.title: SUB] Behind the scene | Catch Cat Crush รักไม่บอก..เหมียวบอกให้
